body.title: T-watchlist-habits: seed watch nodes for Akien topics + executive function questions
body.result: Confirmed done 2026-04-19 audit. 18 PROCEDURAL watch habits live in cortex (memory_type=PROCEDURAL, metadata.habit_type='watch'): 9 questions (WATCH_Q_00..08) and 9 topics (WATCH_T_00..08). Seeder lives at lab/claudecode/seed_watchlist.py, source-of-truth YAML at lab/seed/watchlist.yaml.
body.description: GitHub issue #299. Imported from GH audit — needs triage.
